research_metadata.source: Cross-cultural communication research (Hofstede, Hall, GLOBE), regional marketing studies
research_metadata.note: Native script patterns verified against standard usage

culture_refs.expression: Social standing and reputation preservation
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Position products as status enhancers; emphasize prestige and recognition

culture_refs.expression: Network-based trust and reciprocal obligations
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Use testimonials, referrals, KOL endorsements; build community

culture_refs.expression: Social cohesion and conflict avoidance
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Frame solutions as bringing balance; avoid confrontational messaging

culture_refs.expression: Group identity over individual; family and national pride
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Emphasize family benefits, national brands, 'Made in China' quality narratives

culture_refs.expression: Practical results and value-for-money orientation
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Show concrete ROI, practical benefits, value propositions

taboos.reason: Legal restrictions and strong nationalist sentiment; can result in brand boycotts
Homophone for death (死 sǐ); avoid in pricing, numbering, product names
Historical tensions; avoid imperial Japanese symbols or insensitive WWII references

patterns.context: General action CTA; urgency without pressure
Social proof; large numbers resonate strongly

culture_refs.expression: Personal dignity and social reputation
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Quality and refinement messaging; less about status display than zh-CN

culture_refs.expression: Warmth, empathy, personal connection in service
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Customer service excellence; personalized attention; boutique feel

culture_refs.value: 小確幸 (Xiǎo quèxìng - Small certain happiness)
culture_refs.expression: Appreciating small pleasures in daily life
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Lifestyle products; premium everyday items; self-care narratives

culture_refs.value: 自由民主 (Zìyóu mínzhǔ - Freedom and democracy)
culture_refs.expression: Individual choice and democratic values
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Emphasize choice, customization, personal expression

taboos.topic: Implying Taiwan is part of China
taboos.reason: Highly sensitive political issue; use 'Taiwan' independently, never 'Taiwan, China'
Negative associations with authoritarian governance
Same death association as zh-CN, though slightly less rigid

patterns.context: Clear value proposition without hard sell

culture_refs.expression: Resilience, hard work, self-made success
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Entrepreneurial spirit; self-improvement; professional growth

culture_refs.expression: Practical efficiency and results-orientation
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Time-saving solutions; efficiency gains; ROI clarity

culture_refs.expression: Cosmopolitan identity; East-meets-West sensibility
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Global brands with local adaptation; bilingual content

culture_refs.expression: Professional reputation and social standing
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Premium positioning; luxury associations

taboos.reason: Extremely polarized; brands should remain neutral
Use Traditional Chinese; Simplified associated with mainland influence
Cantonese 'sei' also sounds like death; avoid in pricing

patterns.context: Direct action; Hong Kongers appreciate efficiency

patterns.transliteration: Tàih sīng yihp mouh haauh leut

culture_refs.expression: Group harmony and avoiding conflict; consensus-based decisions
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Solutions that integrate smoothly; team benefits; non-disruptive positioning

culture_refs.expression: Private feelings vs. public facade; reading between lines
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Subtle messaging; implications over explicit claims; respect privacy

culture_refs.expression: Anticipatory service; exceeding expectations without being asked
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Premium customer service; attention to detail; surprise and delight

culture_refs.expression: Incremental betterment; process optimization
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Version updates; iterative improvements; long-term partnership

culture_refs.expression: Meticulous attention to quality and craftsmanship
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Quality certifications; detailed specifications; Japanese-made associations

taboos.reason: Destroys wa (harmony); use indirect suggestions or third-party examples
4=death (死), 9=suffering (苦); avoid in pricing, packaging quantities

taboos.topic: Overly casual language in business contexts
taboos.reason: Keigo (honorific language) expected; casual = disrespectful

patterns.context: Standard action CTA; polite but clear

patterns.template: 無料でお試しください

culture_refs.expression: Speed and urgency culture; fast execution
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Fast delivery; instant results; efficiency messaging

culture_refs.expression: Reading the room; understanding unspoken social cues
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Intuitive UX; anticipatory features; 'we understand you'

culture_refs.expression: Social reputation and dignity
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Premium positioning; status association; avoid embarrassment

culture_refs.expression: Deep emotional attachment formed over time
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Loyalty programs; community building; long-term relationships

culture_refs.expression: Shared historical suffering transformed into strength
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Underdog narratives; overcoming challenges; national pride

taboos.reason: Colonial history sensitive; avoid Japanese associations in certain contexts
Traditionally used for deceased persons' names
Strong Confucian hierarchy; address seniors appropriately

culture_refs.expression: Resourceful problem-solving; making do with less
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Value for money; clever solutions; affordability with quality

culture_refs.expression: Joint family values; family-centric decisions
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Family benefits; multi-generational appeal; family plans

culture_refs.value: आतिथ्य (Atithi Devo Bhava - Guest is God)
culture_refs.expression: Exceptional hospitality; customer as honored guest
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Customer respect; premium service; 'you deserve the best'

culture_refs.expression: Positive outlook; aspirational mindset
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Aspirational messaging; better future; growth stories

taboos.reason: Sacred animal for majority Hindu population; avoid in food/leather contexts
Complex religious diversity; maintain neutrality
Left hand considered impure; show products being used with right hand

culture_refs.expression: Strong family and community bonds
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Community benefits; family packages; group discounts

culture_refs.expression: Hospitality and warmth to outsiders
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Customer appreciation; welcoming messaging

culture_refs.expression: Bengali language and cultural heritage pride
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Bengali language content; cultural references; local festivals

culture_refs.expression: Rising entrepreneurial spirit; self-improvement
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Business growth; skill development; economic empowerment

taboos.reason: Muslim-majority country; respect Islamic values
Avoid implicit comparisons that diminish Bangladeshi identity
Conservative Muslim majority; modest dress and behavior in visuals

culture_refs.expression: Strong pride in Tamil language and culture; oldest living language
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Tamil-first content; acknowledge cultural heritage; avoid Hindi imposition

culture_refs.expression: High value on education and learning
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Educational benefits; skill improvement; knowledge-focused

culture_refs.expression: Strong family bonds and joint family system
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Family benefits; multi-user plans; elder respect

culture_refs.expression: Strong work ethic; industrial state
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Productivity tools; business growth; professional development

taboos.reason: Strong anti-Hindi sentiment historically; always provide Tamil-first content
Sensitive topic; Dravidian movement's anti-caste stance
Sensitive religious dynamics between Hindu majority and minorities

culture_refs.expression: Pride in Telugu language; 'Italian of the East'
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Telugu language content; cultural respect; regional focus

culture_refs.expression: Guest is God; exceptional hospitality
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Customer respect; VIP treatment messaging

culture_refs.expression: Strong family values; joint family decisions
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Family plans; multi-generational benefits

culture_refs.expression: Strong business community; entrepreneurial culture
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Business growth; SME focus; Hyderabad tech hub associations

taboos.reason: Recent state bifurcation; be neutral between regions
Complex caste dynamics; avoid explicit/implicit references
Diverse religious population; maintain neutrality

culture_refs.expression: Deep family bonds; filial piety; ancestral respect
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Family benefits; honoring parents; multi-generational appeal

culture_refs.expression: Value-consciousness; saving mindset; practical spending
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Value for money; savings messaging; practical benefits

culture_refs.expression: High value on education and self-improvement
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Educational benefits; skill development; career advancement

culture_refs.expression: Pride in Vietnamese independence and resilience
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Vietnamese success stories; local brand partnerships

taboos.reason: Called 'American War' in Vietnam; avoid glorifying; sensitive for older generation
South China Sea disputes; avoid perceived Chinese dominance
One-party state; avoid any political commentary

culture_refs.expression: Life should be enjoyable; work should be pleasant
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Enjoyable experience; fun messaging; not too serious

culture_refs.value: เกรงใจ (Kreng Jai - Considerate heart)
culture_refs.expression: Not imposing on others; consideration; avoiding burden
culture_refs.marketing_angle: No-pressure sales; respectful approach; easy opt-out

culture_refs.expression: Social reputation and dignity preservation
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Premium positioning; discretion; status enhancement

culture_refs.value: พระมหากษัตริย์ (Monarchy reverence)
culture_refs.expression: Deep reverence for the Thai royal family
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Royal warrant associations where applicable; never negative royal references

taboos.reason: Illegal; severe prison sentences; never joke about or criticize royalty
Feet are lowest/dirtiest; head is sacred; avoid in imagery
Sacred; don't use decoratively or in inappropriate contexts

มาสนุกกันเถอะ!

culture_refs.marketing_angle: Welcoming tone; 'part of the family' messaging

culture_refs.marketing_angle: Respectful communication; appropriate honorifics

taboos.reason: World's largest Muslim population; respect Islamic values and holidays
Left hand considered unclean; show right hand in product usage
Complex ethnic diversity; avoid favoritism or stereotypes

culture_refs.expression: Graciousness; reciprocal kindness; polite conduct
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Courteous messaging; appreciation; gentle approach

culture_refs.marketing_angle: Inclusive imagery; multi-ethnic representation; unity themes

culture_refs.marketing_angle: Respectful tone; appropriate formality

culture_refs.expression: Unified national identity across ethnicities
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Pan-Malaysian appeal; national pride; local success stories

taboos.reason: Islam is state religion; respect halal requirements and Islamic values
Complex ethnic policies; avoid race-based messaging
Haram for Muslims; separate messaging for different ethnic audiences

culture_refs.expression: Neighbors helping neighbors; community cooperation
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Community features; helping others; shared success

culture_refs.marketing_angle: Social features; group plans; 'share with friends'

culture_refs.marketing_angle: Discrete purchases; privacy features; face-saving options

culture_refs.expression: Reciprocal obligations; loyalty from kindness received
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Loyalty programs; referral rewards; gratitude messaging

culture_refs.expression: Positive outlook; finding joy despite challenges
culture_refs.marketing_angle: Upbeat messaging; humor acceptable; celebration themes

taboos.reason: Strong Catholic majority; respect religious institutions
Complex Spanish/American colonial history; avoid patronizing
Significant inequality; avoid classist messaging

key_differences.zh-CN: Pragmatic, status-focused, collective nationalism, large-number social proof
key_differences.zh-TW: Individual choice, lifestyle quality, warmth, anti-mainland positioning

chinese_variants.critical_localization: Always use correct script (Simplified vs Traditional); never conflate Taiwan with China

differences.japan: Most indirect, consensus (nemawashi), quality obsession, very slow decisions
differences.korea: Ppalli-ppalli urgency, blend of direct/indirect, brand/trend conscious
differences.china: Guanxi networks, pragmatic value-focus, large-scale social proof

critical_localization.tamil: NEVER default to Hindi; Tamil-first is mandatory
critical_localization.hindi: Family messaging; Bollywood celebrity associations effective

node_classes.CultureRef: Store cultural values with importance levels

quality_guidelines.native_review: All patterns should be reviewed by native speakers before production use
quality_guidelines.cultural_validation: CultureRef and Taboo data should be validated with regional marketing experts
quality_guidelines.update_frequency: Review quarterly for geopolitical changes affecting taboos
